results.rendered_html:
jaradaṣṭi (jarant + aṣṭi)
1〉 adj. langlebig: gṛbhṇāmi te saubhagatvāya hastaṃ mayā patyā jaradaṣṭiryathāsaḥ  ṚV. 10,85,36 .  VS. 34,52 .  AV. 2,28,5 . 8,5,19 . 21 .  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 1,8 . 17 .  PĀR. GṚHY. 1,6 . pratyaksevasva bheṣajaṃ jaradaṣṭiṃ kṛṇomi tvā  AV. 5,30,5 . 8 . 12,1,22 . 14,1,49 . 18,3,12 . jaradaṣṭiḥ kṛtavīryo vihāyāḥ sahasrāyuḥ 17,1,27 . 9,3,9 . 18,3,10 .
— 2〉 f. Langlebigkeit: ā rabhasvemāmamṛtasya śruṣṭimacchidyamānā jaradaṣṭirastu te  AV. 8,2,1 . upa tribandhurjaradaṣṭimetyasvaveśaṃ yaṃ kṛṇavanta martāḥ  ṚV. 7,37,7 .
